name: The SPAR Group Limited

foreign_operations.Ireland_BWG: EUR - retained, principal FX exposure (~EUR1.74bn revenue)
foreign_operations.Poland: exited (PLN); residual debt refinanced into ~R1.18bn ZAR bridge facility
foreign_operations.UK_AWG_Appleby_Westward: GBP - sale to A.F. Blakemore signed 18 May 2026, staged completion Jun-Sep 2026 (discontinued, IFRS5)

leadership.CEO: Reeza Isaacs (from 1 March 2026; ex-Woolworths Holdings finance director; was Group CFO from 1 Jan 2025)
leadership.former_CEO: Angelo Swartz (resigned 28 Feb 2026; CEO since Oct 2023; 19 years at SPAR)
leadership.former_CFO: Mark Godfrey (retired 31 Dec 2024; R9.5m exit payment drove 2025 AGM pay revolt)

watch_items: Legacy Poland debt interest drag and effective tax normalisation
